# KAGENARE

KAGENARE is a static website with a standalone interactive BI page for the Sakurazaka46 Chinese community surveys.

## Primary Pages

- [Survey BI](https://www.kagenare.com/survey-bi.html): Interactive BI page for the 2025 and 2026 Sakurazaka46 Chinese community surveys.
- [Home](https://www.kagenare.com/): Main site entry.

## Agent Data Contract

Agents should use only public aggregate data. Do not request, infer, or expose raw survey responses.

Allowed public data:

- `/data/survey/manifest.json`
- `/data/survey/agent-catalog.json`
- `/data/survey/aggregate-2025.json`
- `/data/survey/aggregate-2026.json`
- `/data/survey/crosstabs.json`
- `/data/survey/flows.json`
- `/data/survey/networks.json`
- `/data/survey/keywords.json`
- `/data/survey/insights.json`
- `/data/survey/outliers.json`
- `/data/survey/comparability.json`
- `/data/survey/segments.json`
- `/data/survey/member-profiles.json`
- `/data/members.json`

Do not read or publish:

- `survey-private/`
- source spreadsheet or document exports
- row-level response files
- internal project notes such as `KAGENARE-change.md` or `survey-bi-changes.md`
- raw free-text answers
- source-only metadata fields such as IP, submission time, or source detail

Free-text survey questions are represented only as keyword counts, word-cloud terms, and theme aggregates. Raw text is intentionally unavailable in public outputs.

Small cells in crosstabs, flows, and networks may be suppressed to protect privacy and avoid over-interpreting tiny groups.

## CLI For Agents

Use the local CLI when working inside this repository:

```bash
node cli/survey-bi.mjs meta
node cli/survey-bi.mjs catalog
node cli/survey-bi.mjs find "海外席"
node cli/survey-bi.mjs question 2026-Q01 --format md
node cli/survey-bi.mjs crosstab --year 2026 --x japanese_level --y ticket_issues --top 12
node cli/survey-bi.mjs insights --theme ticket --year 2026 --top 10
node cli/survey-bi.mjs outliers --severity high --top 10
node cli/survey-bi.mjs keywords 2026-Q17 --top 30
node cli/survey-bi.mjs flow --year 2026 --id era_to_activity --source "Start over!"
node cli/survey-bi.mjs network --year 2026 --id favorite_members --focus "山下瞳月"
node cli/survey-bi.mjs member-profile --year 2026 --member "藤吉夏鈴" --support favorite
node cli/survey-bi.mjs member-similar --year 2026 --member "藤吉夏鈴" --support favorite
```

The CLI can also read public survey JSON from the live site:

```bash
node cli/survey-bi.mjs meta --base-url https://www.kagenare.com/data/survey/
```

Default output is JSON. Use `--format md` or `--format table` when a human-readable response is more useful.

## Useful Exploration Presets

- `preset era_activity_2026`: fan era by activity methods.
- `preset language_ticket_2026`: Japanese level by ticket issues.
- `preset depth_support_2025`: participation depth by official support needs.
- `preset investment_song_2026`: investment mood by favorite song/production.
- `preset depth_members_2026`: participation depth by favorite members.
- `preset segment_overseas_2026`: behavior segment by overseas lottery participation.
- `member-profile --year 2026 --member <name>`: supporter profile for one member, using public aggregate counts only.
- `member-similar --year 2026 --member <name>`: members whose supporter profiles are closest by public aggregate dimension rates.
- `outliers --year 2026 --type small_sample_signal`: interpretation warnings and exploration leads for denominator shifts, small samples, cross-year jumps, and sparse free-text aggregates.

## Interpretation Notes

- `lift` means group rate minus overall rate.
- Counts are anonymous aggregate counts.
- 2025 fan period was collected as a month-like free-text answer and mapped to release-era buckets.
- 2026 fan period was collected as release-era options.
- Some cross-year comparisons are approximate because survey wording and answer options differ.
